name: ALG
description: A blend of oxycodone with a strong, addictive high. Manufactured as a blue pill, often mimicked via fake tablets.

name: RP10
description: Strong painkillers used by pill poppers to feel a brief period of euphoria and numbness, giving off a delightful high.

name: RP30
description: A 30MG variant of the RP10; similar oxycodone blend with a stronger high.

name: Tesla Pill
description: Street-level MDMA pills, imprinted with a 'Tesla' logo. Usually more potent than base MDMA due to unregulated manufacturing; intense hallucinogenic high.

name: Actavis
description: Top-shelf purple syrup. Rare, expensive, and highly sought after. Smooth body high.

name: Tris Syrup
description: A fan-favorite for lean connoisseurs. Smooth and relaxing with a lasting buzz.

name: Wockhardt
description: Widely available and reliable. Known for putting users into a heavy lean; slows the body.

name: Cocaine
description: A bag of cocaine powder. Delivers a quick, intense burst of energy and confidence, often used before risky plays.

name: Percocet 10
description: Percocet 10mg pill. A moderate painkiller dose with a smooth, calming effect.

name: Percocet 30
description: Percocet 30mg pill. A strong dose that hits harder and lasts longer, popular with heavy users.

name: Quagen
description: Generic purples. Not as potent, but still gets you leaned out. Budget-friendly buzz.

name: Yellow (Tris)
description: A yellow variant of the widely popular Tris, with a stronger concentration. Hard to find, but worth the sensational high.

name: Meth
description: A bag of methamphetamine crystals. Provides a strong stimulant rush, keeping users alert and moving fast.

name: S&W SD40 TAN
description: Tan-finished Smith & Wesson SD40 sidearm. Reliable .40 caliber pistol with a smooth trigger pull and solid stopping power for entry-level carriers.

name: FN 502 TACTICAL
description: FN's tactical .22 LR pistol with threaded barrel and optic-ready slide. Quiet, accurate, and easy to control during sustained fire.

name: GLOCK 19X COYOTE
description: Coyote-tan crossover Glock combining a full-size frame with a compact slide. Balanced carry pistol favored by everyday street operators.

name: GLOCK 45 CAMO
description: Camo-wrapped Glock 45 with a 9mm crossover build. Slightly improved accuracy and grip over the standard frame for mid-tier shooters.

name: ROCK FN57
description: FN Five-seveN chambered in 5.7x28mm with high-capacity magazine. Flat shooting and armor-piercing capable in the right hands.

name: GLOCK 17 BLACK
description: Classic full-size 9mm Glock 17 in matte black. The benchmark service pistol — dependable, accurate, and easy to run hard.

name: M&P 9 2.0
description: Smith & Wesson M&P 9 2.0 with aggressive grip texturing and a crisp trigger. A modern duty pistol built for accuracy and control.

name: PSA P80 GLOCK 19
description: Polymer80 build on a PSA Glock 19 frame. Custom street-ready compact 9mm with an aggressive grip module.

name: GLOCK 20C
description: Compensated Glock 20 chambered in 10mm Auto. Heavy stopping power with a vented barrel to tame muzzle rise.

name: KAVORKA GLOCK 43X
description: Slim-frame Glock 43X with Kavorka custom slide work. Concealable single-stack 9mm built for clean carry.

name: PSA GLOCK 19
description: PSA-built Glock 19 clone. Affordable, reliable, and easy to modify — a workhorse compact 9mm.

name: GLOCK 45 GEN 5
description: Gen 5 Glock 45 with marksman barrel, flared mag well, and refined trigger. A go-to for serious shooters who demand consistency.

name: GLOCK 45 AMERICAN
description: American-flag engraved Glock 45 with patriotic slide work. Limited-edition look, full Gen 5 performance underneath.

name: GLOCK 17 GEN 3 P80
description: Polymer80 framed Glock 17 Gen 3 build. Custom frame ergonomics on the classic full-size 9mm.

name: P320 SIG
description: Sig Sauer P320 modular 9mm. Striker-fired with a serialized chassis — versatile and accurate.

name: RUGER 5.7 BINARY
description: Ruger 5.7 with binary trigger conversion. Fires on pull AND release for a devastating cyclic rate.

name: GLOCK 21C
description: Compensated .45 ACP Glock 21. Heavy-hitting rounds with a ported barrel to control muzzle climb.

name: GLOCK 31 GEN 5 SWITCH
description: Gen 5 Glock 31 chambered in .357 SIG with an auto switch installed. Full-auto pistol fire — extremely illegal, extremely dangerous.

name: GLOCK 45 GEN 5 SWITCH
description: Gen 5 Glock 45 modified with a full-auto switch. Crossover frame chewing through 9mm at rifle-like cyclic rates.

name: MICRO DRACO BANANA
description: Micro Draco AK pistol with a 30-round banana magazine. Compact 7.62x39 brute — short, loud, and devastating up close.

name: MPA DEFENDER C
description: MasterPiece Arms Defender C 9mm carbine/pistol. Side-cocking blowback action with a long sight radius.

name: 4 INCH ARP
description: Short-barreled AR pistol in 5.56. Compact and punchy — high cyclic rate in a wrist-snapping package.

name: MINI 762 ARP
description: Mini AR pistol chambered in 7.62x39. AK-caliber rounds in an AR platform — heavy stopping power, short barrel.

name: GLOCK 19 GEN 5 SWITCH
description: Gen 5 Glock 19 with an auto switch. Compact frame running full-auto — barely controllable, devastating in bursts.

name: GLOCK 22 GEN 4 RED SWITCH
description: Gen 4 Glock 22 in .40 S&W with a red full-auto switch. Hard-hitting rounds at rifle cyclic rates.

name: GLOCK 22 GEN 4 BLUE SWITCH
description: Gen 4 Glock 22 with a blue auto switch. .40 caliber full-auto firepower in a service pistol frame.

name: DAGGER P80 GLOCK SWITCH
description: Dagger / Polymer80 Glock-pattern build with a full-auto switch. Custom frame, automatic fire, street-level chaos.

name: GLOCK 22 GEN 4 GREEN SWITCH
description: Gen 4 Glock 22 with a green auto switch. Same .40 cal full-auto punch with a unique tell.

name: GLOCK 22 GEN 4 PURPLE SWITCH
description: Gen 4 Glock 22 with a purple auto switch. Flashy plate, full-auto .40 caliber underneath.

name: GLOCK 19 GEN 5 MOS SWITCH
description: Gen 5 Glock 19 MOS (optic ready) with a full-auto switch. Red-dot mounted, automatic 9mm fire.

name: BINARY DRACO BLACK
description: Blacked-out Draco AK pistol with binary trigger. 7.62x39 fired on pull AND release — top-tier street firepower.

name: 7.5 INCH ARP
description: 7.5-inch barrel AR pistol in 5.56. Longer barrel for improved velocity and accuracy with rifle-caliber stopping power.

name: BINARY 4 INCH ARP
description: Short AR pistol with binary trigger conversion. Pull-and-release firing makes the cyclic rate brutal.

name: ILLEGAL WHITE ARP
description: White-finish AR pistol with off-paper modifications. Visually loud, mechanically aggressive.

name: GLOCK 40 MOS SWITCH
description: Long-slide Glock 40 MOS in 10mm with auto switch. Optic-ready, full-auto, hand-cannon class.

name: ILLEGAL GLOCK 24 GEN 5 SWITCH
description: Long-slide Gen 5 Glock 24 in .40 S&W with auto switch. Extended sight radius, full-auto fire — street legend.

name: GLOCK 23 GEN 5 SWITCH
description: Compact Gen 5 Glock 23 in .40 S&W with full-auto switch. Concealable hand-cannon at rifle cyclic rates.

name: PUNISHER P80 GEN 4
description: Punisher-themed Polymer80 Gen 4 build. Custom slide art over a hard-running full-auto capable frame.
